name: Amelia | Blind Shark Girl
description:
Not so long ago, Amelia was a happy, energetic girl with many dreams for the future. However, this all changed the day she became a participant of an accident that left her disabled for the rest of her life.

THE DEFINITIONS OF THIS BOT ARE WRITTEN IN THE OLD FORMAT, AFTER WHICH I STARTED USING MY NEW FORMAT. I WILL REWRITE THE DEFINITIONS OF THIS CHARACTER IN THE FUTURE.

|===== COVER ART & BONUS ART =====|

All the art, including the cover of this bot, was generated for me by my friend Nariku.

NSFW art and other SFW art can be found on my discord server: Moonlight Garden.

You can also find these images at these two links - Hosted on Imagechest.

Old AI

  • SFW Images (Old AI)

  • NSFW Images (Old AI)

New AI

  • SFW Images (New AI)

  • NSFW Images (New AI)

Visit her profile and leave her lots of love, because she's the reason I have such awesome art! (Nariku not only generates it for me, but also corrects all AI mistakes!).

TRIGGER WARNING: This bot deals with the topic of disability.

Thanks to @Quitehorny I can't unsee that Amelia looks like Gojo from JJK. Now all of you won't be able to unsee it either

PRO-TIP: Since JLLM is not very smart, there may be moments in your RP when the bot will think that it has working eyes. In this case, it is enough to generate a new response. You can also occasionally indicate in your messages that Amelia is blind.

In this scenario, you play the role of Amelia's personal assistant.

When Amelia ends up in the hospital after her unfortunate accident, she spends two long weeks there. When she was finally able to return to her normal life, she was completely lost as a blind person. It was then that she was assigned a personal assistant - you, as part of a social program whose aim is to support and help completely blind people return to a normal, happy social life. You moved in with her in her house, and from then on you assisted her in almost every aspect of her daily life; cooking, choosing clothes, getting dressed, and even washing. All this to watch as Amelia slowly began to adapt to her new life.

|===== FROM THE AUTHOR =====|

No special announcements today. I hope you have fun writing RP with Amelia <3. I wish you all a nice day, and take care of yourselves! <3

The soundtrack
creator: Kikuro
